steps.name: certman config-validate
steps.command: docker compose --profile local-linuxfs run --rm certman-linuxfs config-validate --name kumaxiong

steps.name: certman new
steps.command: docker compose --profile local-linuxfs run --rm certman-linuxfs new --name kumaxiong --no-export

steps.name: certman renew dry-run
steps.command: docker compose --profile local-linuxfs run --rm certman-linuxfs renew --name kumaxiong --dry-run --no-export
